contentList.content: The shoes’ fabric pulses with an otherworldly energy. Faint, glowing runes whisper beneath them, forming the curious word “Bapeery.”
Call forth spirits to protect the area around you.
Nearby enemies take [1] per turn, and their <LSTag Tooltip="MovementSpeed">movement speed</LSTag> is halved.
Call forth spirits to protect the area around you.
Nearby enemies take [1] per turn, and their <LSTag Tooltip="MovementSpeed">movement speed</LSTag> is halved.
Call forth spirits to protect you. Nearby enemies take [1] or [2] per turn, and their <LSTag Tooltip="MovementSpeed">movement speed</LSTag> is halved.
